seo.title: DevOps Engineer Resume Examples & ATS Templates 2026
seo.description: Write a perfect DevOps Engineer resume that passes ATS. Includes Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform keywords, common mistakes, and a complete resume example.
seo.keywords: devops engineer resume, kubernetes resume, terraform resume, SRE resume, platform engineer resume 2026
seo.ogDescription: The exact resume template that lands DevOps and SRE interviews at top tech companies.

hero.title: DevOps Engineer Resume Examples
hero.description: Land DevOps roles at FAANG and top startups. Our ATS-optimized templates highlight your infrastructure, automation, and cloud skills in the exact format hiring managers want.

mistakes: Listing tools without context (e.g., 'Used Kubernetes' vs 'Managed a 200-node Kubernetes cluster on EKS serving 5M daily requests').
No certifications listed — DevOps roles highly value AWS/CKA certifications. Lead with these.
Describing what you did, not the business impact: 'Set up CI/CD' vs 'Reduced deployment time from 45 minutes to 7 minutes, enabling 3x faster release cadence.'
tips: Lead with your certifications (CKA, AWS DevOps Professional) — they're the strongest first-signal for DevOps roles.
Quantify everything: uptime SLAs achieved, deployment frequency, cost savings, cluster size, scale.
Include a 'Tools & Technologies' section rather than a generic skills list — specificity wins ATS.

exampleResume.name: Priya Sharma
exampleResume.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
exampleResume.summary: Platform engineer with 6+ years of experience building and maintaining cloud-native infrastructure at scale. Certified Kubernetes Administrator and AWS Certified DevOps Engineer. Reduced infrastructure costs by $1.2M/year through right-sizing and reserved instances at TechScale.

bullets: Architected and managed 3 production EKS clusters (200+ nodes) serving 10M daily requests with 99.97% uptime SLA.
Implemented GitOps deployment pipeline (ArgoCD + GitHub Actions), reducing mean deployment time from 45 min to 6 min.
Led FinOps initiative: right-sized EC2 instances and implemented savings plans, reducing AWS bill by $1.2M/year.
Built full CI/CD pipeline for 15 microservices using GitHub Actions, Docker, and AWS ECS.
Provisioned multi-environment AWS infrastructure with Terraform, reducing provisioning time from 2 days to 20 minutes.

exampleResume.skills: Kubernetes (EKS, GKE), Docker, Terraform, Helm, ArgoCD, GitHub Actions, AWS (EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, IAM), Prometheus, Grafana, Python, Bash, Linux, Ansible
